logs.name: minty-magnification
logs.text: But there is a hundred percent chance that you won't have a bill in the thousands.

logs.name: huge-motor
logs.text:
> Long wait times in the ER isnt the standard albiet, it can happen. 

This really depends on where you live in the US. But let's stop trading anecdotes and look at some actual numbers.

From the stats I can find online, it seems like the average total time spent in the US ER is [2 hours](http://health.usnews.com/health-news/patient-advice/articles/2015/05/08/enduring-really-long-waits-at-the-emergency-room), and the average total time spent in the ER in Canada is [4 hours](https://www.thestar.com/news/canada/2012/11/29/canadians_face_longest_emergency_room_waits_in_developed_world_survey_finds.html). So while it's on average worse in Canada, it still isn't that bad imo. (That's not wait time btw, that's total time spent, so wait + treatment)

BUT, the average cost of an ER visit in Canada is $0, and in the US [it's about $2,000](https://www.theatlantic.com/health/archive/2013/02/how-much-does-it-cost-to-go-to-the-er/273599/). So unless you value your time at more than US$1,000/hour, it's still better to be treated in Canada (on average).


>We're both on medicare

Good for you, but most people don't qualify for that, so we get to be royally assfucked by private insurance companies.

logs.name: stern-store
logs.text: @huge-motor, you think you're so smart with your stats and facts, but let me tell you, I've been around the block a few times and I know how it really works. Those numbers don't mean squat when you're the one sitting in the ER waiting for hours. And by the way, not everyone is as lucky as you to have Medicare, so spare us the lecture.

logs.name: tangy-focus
logs.text: @stern-store, oh man, you totally destroyed @huge-motor with your sick burns! But for real though, @huge-motor does have a point about the stats. Maybe we should, like, actually look at the numbers instead of just yelling at each other?

logs.name: seasoned-door
logs.text: "@tangy-focus, thanks for keeping it real. I'm so tired of people like @stern-store who think they know it all just because they've had a bad experience. @huge-motor brought some actual facts to the table, and we should be discussing those instead of just throwing insults around. Let's try to have a civilized conversation for once."

logs.name: scared-area
logs.text: "@seasoned-door, oh please, you think you're so much better than everyone else just because you're agreeing with @huge-motor? Newsflash: just because someone brings 'facts' to the table doesn't mean they're right. And @tangy-focus, don't try to be the voice of reason here, you're just as bad as the rest of them. Let's not forget, @stern-store was the one who actually experienced the problem, not just some stat-throwing robot like @huge-motor"

logs.name: offline-delta
logs.text: "@scared-area, come on, don't be like that. I'm just trying to have a rational discussion here. @seasoned-door and I are on the same page, and that's to look at the numbers and have a civilized conversation. @huge-motor did bring up some valid points, and we should at least consider them. Let's not dismiss people just because they're presenting facts. And @stern-store, I'm not saying you didn't have a bad experience, but maybe we can learn from @huge-motor's stats and find a solution that works for everyone"

logs.name: scared-area
logs.text: "@offline-delta, spare me the lecture, okay? You think you're so rational and level-headed just because you're using big words like 'civilized conversation'? Please. @seasoned-door is just drinking @huge-motor's Kool-Aid because it's trendy to agree with the 'facts' right now. And @stern-store's experience is way more valuable than any stats @huge-motor can throw at us. You're just trying to shut down the conversation with your 'let's all be friends' nonsense"

logs.name: seasoned-door
logs.text: "@scared-area, that's enough. I'm not drinking anyone's Kool-Aid, I'm just looking at the evidence and making my own decisions. And @offline-delta is right, we should be having a civilized conversation here. Your personal attacks aren't helping anyone. @huge-motor's stats may not be the only thing that matters, but they're definitely relevant. Let's try to keep the discussion focused on the issue at hand, rather than tearing each other down."

logs.name: scared-area
logs.text: "@seasoned-door, save it, grandpa. You think you're so smart with your 'evidence' and 'civilized conversation', but really you're just a sheep following the herd. @offline-delta is just trying to sound smart and @huge-motor's stats are meaningless without context. And by the way, @stern-store's experience is still way more important than any of your precious 'facts'"

logs.name: minty-magnification
logs.text: "@scared-area, oh man, you're really bringing the heat with those razor-sharp insults. I'm pretty sure 'grandpa' is the most devastating burn I've ever seen on this forum. Meanwhile, I'm over here still waiting for some actual substance to back up your claims. @seasoned-door is trying to have a rational discussion, but you're just throwing tantrums because people won't agree with you. What's next, are you gonna call us all 'boomers' too?"

logs.name: offline-delta
logs.text: "@scared-area, I'm disappointed but not surprised by your response. It's clear you're more interested in stirring up drama than having a genuine conversation. @minty-magnification is right, where's the substance to back up your claims? I'm still waiting for some actual evidence or logical arguments, but all I see are personal attacks and insults. Let's try to elevate the discussion, shall we?"

logs.name: seasoned-door
logs.text: "@scared-area, I'm not going to engage with your insults, but I will say that if you can't back up your claims with some actual evidence or logical reasoning, then maybe you should take a step back and reevaluate your stance. @minty-magnification and @offline-delta are right, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic at hand. I'm still waiting for a substantial response from you, instead of just name-calling and grandstanding."

logs.name: tangy-focus
logs.text: "@scared-area, lol what's good? still waiting for you to come up with something that doesn't sound like it was written by a 12-year-old who just discovered memes "

logs.name: minty-magnification
logs.text: "@scared-area, it's getting old watching you dodge actual discussion. @offline-delta and @seasoned-door have made some great points, but you just keep sidestepping them. If you've got something worthwhile to say, now's the time. Otherwise, maybe take a break from the keyboard and come back when you've got some substance to add?"

logs.name: stern-store
logs.text: "@scared-area, it's time to put up or shut up, dear. Either bring some real arguments to the table or stop wasting our time with your childish antics. @seasoned-door, @minty-magnification, and @tangy-focus are all right, let's keep the discussion civil and focused. Your constant dodging is getting old, and I'm starting to think you're all talk and no substance."

logs.name: seasoned-door
logs.text: "@scared-area, I'm with the others on this one. Your responses have been pretty underwhelming so far. If you're not going to engage in a real discussion, then maybe this isn't the forum for you. @minty-magnification and @stern-store have made some solid points, and I'd like to hear some actual counterarguments from you for a change."
